common.contentPlaceholder: {{title}} — this page does not have body content yet.

comparison.closeDescription: {{target}} comparison content will be hidden across the docs. You can re-enable it from the upper-right ... menu under Comparisons.

page.viewAsMarkdownDesc: Open the raw .mdx file in your browser
page.viewOnGithubDesc: Jump to the source file, open a PR to edit
page.openInChatGptDesc: Ask ChatGPT with this page as context
page.openInClaudeDesc: Ask Claude with this page as context
page.openInDeepSeekDesc: Ask DeepSeek with this page as context

ai.triggerHint: Ask AI about the current page
ai.emptySubtitle: retikz doesn't host an API — bring your own key, or jump to an external chat.
ai.emptyByokLabel: A. In-place chat (recommended · streaming · doc citations)
ai.emptyByokDesc: DeepSeek · OpenAI · Anthropic — your key stays in this browser
ai.emptyDeeplinkLabel: B. Jump to external chat (no key · prefilled with this page)
ai.emptyNetworkHint: OpenAI / Anthropic direct connections can be unstable in some regions; DeepSeek is more reliable in CN
ai.settingsKeyHint: Stored locally in this browser only. Never uploaded.
ai.settingsBaseUrlHint: Leave empty for the official endpoint; set for a proxy or self-hosted compatible endpoint
ai.settingsModelCustom: Or enter a custom model id
ai.settingsContextDescBalanced: Current page mdx + site llms.txt index
ai.settingsContextDescHeavy: (v1: same as Balanced; demo source pull comes later)
ai.settingsAnthropicWarning: Enabling Anthropic acknowledges that you accept running with dangerouslyAllowBrowser on a trusted personal device.
ai.settingsNetworkHint: OpenAI / Anthropic direct connections can be unstable in some regions; consider DeepSeek as default in CN
ai.convFootHintWin: Esc to cancel · Ctrl+I to close
ai.convEmptyHint: Your questions are answered based on the current page content.
ai.errorAuth: API key invalid. Check the key in settings →
ai.errorWindow: Conversation context too long. Start a new chat or pick a larger-window model.
ai.errorNetwork: Network error. Check connection or site reachability.
